name: Data Engineering Portfolio
updateContentCommand: [ -f packages.txt ] && sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y && sudo xargs apt install -y <packages.txt; for dir in projects/*; do if [ -d "$dir" ]; then echo "⚙️ Syncing environment for: $dir" && cd "$dir" && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install pip-tools && [ -f requirements.txt ] && .venv/bin/pip-sync requirements.txt; cd - > /dev/null; fi; done
